name: 5"x7" Checkered Table Picture Frame - Threshold™
description:
Showcase your cherished moments with the 5"x7" Matted to 4"x6" Checkered Table Picture Frame from Threshold™. Crafted from durable pine, this rectangular frame features a stylish checkered design that adds a modern touch to any space. The included mat perfectly fits a 4"x6" photo, while the easel back offers horizontal or vertical tabletop display options.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
